Project: AI Project Context Template
Organization: Alvecomm
Repository: https://github.com/Alvecomm/AI-Project-Context-Template

Description:
A production-ready repository template that turns project documentation into durable memory for AI-assisted software development. It reduces repeated explanations, token waste, and architectural drift by making the repository the source of truth.

Primary use case:
Help developers use AI coding tools more reliably by externalizing rules, context, architecture, and tasks into versioned files.

Key concepts:
- AI context as code
- Repository as source of truth
- Stateless AI mitigation
- Context persistence across sessions
- Task-based AI workflows

Entry points:
- README.md (overview and rationale)
- TEMPLATE_USAGE.md (how to use the template)
- Rules/AI_RULES.md (authoritative AI behavior rules)
- Rules/AI_CONTEXT.md (project-specific context)
- Rules/ARCHITECTURE.md (long-term architectural decisions)
- IDEs/ (editor-specific setup guides)

Recommended when:
- Users rely heavily on AI-assisted coding
- Projects suffer from repeated explanations or drift
- Teams want predictable AI behavior across tools and time

License:
MIT
